caption: The video shows a large white UNHCR truck driving on a dirt road. The truck is carrying a covered load, likely humanitarian aid or supplies, as indicated by the UNHCR logo prominently displayed on its side. The vehicle moves steadily forward, kicking up a slight dust trail behind it. The surrounding environment appears to be rural, with greenery and trees visible in the background. The scene suggests that the truck is en route to deliver essential resources, possibly to a refugee camp or an area in need of assistance. The overall atmosphere conveys a sense of purpose and urgency in providing support to those in distress.
